college_info.college_name: Pratap University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Is MBA at Pratap University better than University of Engineering and Management, Jaipur?
faqs.answer:
UEM provides Outcome Based Education Placement to all eligible students Support for Research, Publication, Innovation & Entrepreneurship Student and Faculty Exchange Program with foreign universities Strong Faculty Base to Students from all over the Country Even in regular online classes during the pandemic, examination and evaluation allows students to graduate in a stipulated time without missing a single day.
Pratap University delivers quality education by offering programs in Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Basic Science & Humanities, Information Technology, Education, Library Science, and Mass Communication. The university campus covers a hundred acres of beautiful green surroundings, well-equipped hostel facilities, cutting-edge infrastructure, and well-equipped libraries and laboratories.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Pratap University?
faqs.answer:
After successfully completing the course, an MBA candidate has a broad range of employment options and room for advancement. A few are open for specialisation, some of which include finance, logistics, automobile, marketing, and human resource management.The candidate has an opportunity for a job at any level of management depending on the interest and specialisation of the MBA candidate, a variety of campus placement drives are also a golden opportunity for the best placement in any of the aforementioned working areas.
The average package could be expected to lie around INR 3 LPA- INR 5 LPA.
The highest package could lie around INR 6LPA –INR 7 LPA.
Top recruiters are VI!, Microsoft, Larsen Tourbo, Indusinsight, Mahindra Rise etc.

faqs.question: What are the fees for MBA programmes at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Pratap University MBA fee shall include multiple components, such as tuition fee, caution deposit, and more. The total tuition fee for the PG course is INR 3 lakh. Students shall pay the fee to confirm their admission. This fee amount is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: How costly is Pratap University?
faqs.answer:
At Pratap University It totally depends on the course you are pursuing. There are many courses that are offered in the university like MBA, BE/Btech, and BCA/MCA
The current tuition fees of different programs are-
MBA- INR 3 lakh
BE/Btech -INR 5.6 lakh
BCA- INR 2.5 lakh

college_info.intro: Pratap University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. MBA and BTech students are placed in top companies such as SIS Cash Services (P) Ltd. (SIS Prosegur), Genpact, JBM Group, and others. BTech students can become Engineers, Data Analysts, Web Developers, Software Developers, Software Engineers, AI Engineers, Data Scientists, or can go for other job opportunities. The university teaches BTech students to build, test, and upgrade various softwares and computer applications. Through the MBA course, the university tries to transform the students into effective administrators and leaders that are equipped to face several challenges of the corporate world. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

placements.overview: Pratap University offers placement assistance to students. The university is visited by top companies for placements such as SIS Cash Services (P) Ltd. (SIS Prosegur), Radico Khaitan, Interglobe Technologies, Aon, Daffodil Software, Genpact, Birlasoft, Appirio, Sopra Steria, JBM Group, and others.

faqs.answer: A:    The placement cell of the university coordinates with students and assures placement at a reputed company within six months of graduating. There's also an Employability Enhancement and Competency Development Program organized by the university as an Audit Course, which every student has to take mandatorily. Pratap University's placement cell has strong professional networks with several companies across diverse networks.
faqs.question: Is Pratap University good for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    The companies that were part of Pratap University Jaipur placements 2023 are yet to be disclosed. Some of the leading companies that participated in recent years’ drives are mentioned below:Pratap University Placements: Top RecruitersSIS Cash Services (P) Ltd. (SIS Prosegur)Radico KhaitanInterglobe TechnologiesAonDaffodil SoftwareGenpactBirlasoftSopra SteriaJBM GroupAppirio

faqs.question: Where do Pratap University alumni work?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the University has a dedicated placement cell that has tied up with prominent corporate joints. From time to time, the Pratap University placement cell organises training sessions such as Personality Development and Soft Skill training. Further, the University also has an Entrepreneurship cell that enhances the creativity skill among the students and helps them choose the best option.
faqs.question: Does Pratap University Jaipur offer campus placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Pratap University gives UG, PG, & other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management, Engineering, Computer Application, & various other streams. At the UG level, the university has BTech, BBA, BSc, BCA, & other courses to students. At the PG level, the university has MBA, MCA, MSc, & other courses to students. Below are some of the courses & their respective eligibility & fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    Pratap University provides separate good quality hostels for boys and girls. The hostel fees at this university is around INR 60000.PU Hostel For Female: INR 60 kInternational student is $2000 USD (AC) & $1500 USD (Non-AC) inclusive of all.PU Hostel For Male: INR 60 kInternational student is $2000 USD (AC) & $1500 USD (Non-AC) inclusive of all.
faqs.question: What is the hostel fees at Pratap University?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need to go step-wise to get admission in Pratap University. Aspirants first need to check the eligibility criteria and apply for the preferred programme. In case, aspirants have an entrance exam score, they can get admission based on it. The university also selects candidates based on merit in the last qualifying exam.
faqs.question: Can I join Pratap University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates are required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12. Candidates need to pass a minimum of graduation for PG programmes. Below is Pratap University eligibility criteria for popular courses:Course NameCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)MBAGraduation in any stream (BA, BSc, BCom, BTech) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BBAClass 12 with at least 48% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BCAClass 12 with at least 48% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)MCABSc (Mathematics Group) or BSc (IT) or BSc (CS) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BPharmClass 12 with PCB/ PCM with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for Pratap University?

faqs.answer: A:    Pratap University eligibility requirements varies course-wise. However, the minimum aggregate required for UG courses ranges between 45%-50% aggregate. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for SC/ ST candidates. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can easily get admission in Pratap University courses.
faqs.question: Can I get admission to Pratap University with 60% in Class 12?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with Pratap University currently because of its faculty and placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students are placed in my course. The highest salary package offered was 1.2 crore per annum, the average salary package offered was 8 LPA. And the lowest salary package offered was 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Infosys, TCS, Bosch, Volkswagen, and Deutsche Bank. Almost 85% of students secured internships at Deutsche Bank, HCL Tech, and TCS. Management Trainee, Equity Analyst, Data Analyst, and Investment Banker are top roles offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, hostel, indoor games, and many essential facilities are provided in the college. Hostel food is quite nice compared to others, and 24/7 medical facilities are available. However, there is no sports coach. Students cannot play sports like basketball or cricket due to the lack of a coach.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Students are playing with their future in this university by taking admission.

review_content.Placements: Till the time I studied in this university, no one came for placement. Even in this university, the university never took us on industrial visit, whereas my other friends study in UPTU colleges, their college people used to take them for training from 2 year but till date this has not happened in our place. We students were just pressurized in the university that if talk too much we will fails.
review_content.Infrastructure: Till date, neither any good canteen has opened in this university nor any good food has been found in the mess. The quality of the pulses that were fed to us in the hostel mess was exactly like the food we got in jail. The teachers of the university were not at all professionals, they were just pass out students from some college university who came to this university only to get experience, he was not worried about our future at all. He said, I have received my salary, it doesn't matter to me whether you pass or fails. I have had a very bad experience in this university. The owner of this university never came to see the university, he used to run the university from a distance.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Pratap University Rajasthan Jaipur .

review_content.Placements: Minimum 12th passout students are eligible for BCA or any other course. The average package is 16LPA and the lowest average package is 3LPA. Google, Reliance, etc. IT Companies TOP Roles offered BCA course & Medical course, business course, librarian course etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Great infrastructure, all facilities available like class room, canteen, Wi-Fi, library, playground. Also classrooms is too good, and canteen. Some of the facilities include well ventilated classrooms, recreational areas, hostel facility for boys and girls, indoor and outdoor games, stocked library.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: In this college, there was no companies visit to hire students. The worst place to get admission for engineering. The worst place to build students' careers, and the location was also not good. The placements had no name or even a single company does not come for asking also.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel was not good. The facility was not good, and the food served was very dirty, and the infrastructure was also not good. Bed was broken, and there were no good things in the rooms. The condition of room was also not good, and water condition was also not good. The washrooms were not clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for B.Pharma students, and the placements in 2021 were good.

review_content.Placements: The college provides good placement opportunities. More than 20 medical industries come here every year. The teachers work hard for students to make them get selected for the interview. The average package ranges from 3 to 6 LPA. If you are good at academics, then you will surely get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The camps of Pratap University is good and has good infrastructure. Every department has practical laboratories separately. The course is well designed according to semesters. The ratio of practicals and theory is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Placements in 2019 were good, and faculty members are highly expert.

review_content.Placements: In B.Pharma, 60% of the students are getting placed every year. Many MNCs and institutes hire students of Pratap University with profiles like medical executives and technical assistants. Allied Chemical, Ankur Lab and Ranbaxy are the top recruiters of our college. Generally, the salary package offered in B.Pharma is 3-4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Pratap University has a good infrastructure for the B.Pharma course, and laboratories and equipment are modern and have the latest design. These things make the college the best B.Pharma college in Rajasthan. Mess food quality is good, and the boys' hostel is safe with a secure environment.

overview_faqs.question: Is Pratap University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Pratap University was established in 2011. The Pratap University in Jaipur is renowned for providing top-notch instruction at all levels. At Pratap University in Jaipur, you can find higher education, professional training, or technical aspects all in one location. The university works to create a positive environment for students and supports them as they make plans for a better future. The goal of the university is to advance skill-based education for increased effectiveness and better learning for students. The university consistently tries to assist students in keeping up with the demands of the real world because it strongly believes in the value of quality education. Pratap University in Jaipur is well-liked outside of India, and it has established numerous partnerships abroad to benefit its students. so Pratap University good for an MBA

admission_overview.college_name: Pratap University Course Admissions: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Pratap University admissionis primarilymerit-based. Candidates who have qualified any of the national-level entrance exam can also take admission based on their score. The university offers various courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels through eight departments.Pratap Universityoffers courses in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management,Pharmacy, Education, etc. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of PU.

Pratap University offers courses in full-time mode. Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online on the university website for their preferred course. Find below the keyPratap University admissionhighlights:
Particulars
Pratap University Admission Highlights 2024
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2024
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Pratap University admissionsare based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates need to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below are popularPratap University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Check out otherPratap University Courses

Pratap University admissions begin with the opening of the registration portal. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply for the course of their choice. Below is step-wise admission process for Pratap University:
STEP 1: Pratap University Application Process
The mode of application is online. Candidates can register with their personal, academic and other details. Aspirants also need to upload scanned documents to complete the application process.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Once the registration is over, aspirants are selected based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates with a valid score in any of the national entrance exam can also get admission. The university evaluates the applications of the candidates for admission.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Selected candidates need to upload the specified documents for verification. After uploading the documents, the prescribed admission fee needs to be paid for confirmed admission. The admission fee can be paid through any valid online process. Candidates may also add their hostel/ accommodation & transportation fee while making payment. After payment, admission is considered confirmed
Check out more details in the below video:

headings.text: Steps for Pratap University Admission Process 2024

courses_data.name: Pratap University BTech Admission
courses_data.description: Pratap University offers four-year BTech programme spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech inComputer Science Engineering,Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for BTech programme. Besides, the university also offers lateral entry to BTech programmes. The selection for BTech is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants withJEE Mainor any other national-level entrance exam score can also get admission.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Pratap University offers four-year BTech programme spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech in various specialisations:Computer Science EngineeringCivil EngineeringMechanical EngineeringElectronic & Communication EngineeringElectrical Engineering

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in BTech at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Candidates are selected for BTech admission at Pratap University based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates with a valid JEE Main or any other Engineering entrance exam score can get admission in BTech. Aspirants need to come for document verification after selection. Aspirants need to pay course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech at Pratap University?

placement_data.title: Pratap University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Pratap University has a proactive placement cell with a strong professional network across diverse sectors. It actively coordinates with students and ensures placement in reputed companies within six months of completing the course. In addition to this, the Pratap University Jaipur placement cell has added ‘ Employability Enhancement and Competency Development ’ as a part of the curriculum. The cell organizes corporate customised programmes and offers in-house internships to deserving students.

faqs.question: Is Pratap University good for placements?
faqs.answer: The placement cell of the university coordinates with students and assures placement at a reputed company within six months of graduating. There's also an Employability Enhancement and Competency Development Program organized by the university as an Audit Course, which every student has to take mandatorily. Pratap University's placement cell has strong professional networks with several companies across diverse networks.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: After successfully completing the course, an MBA candidate has a broad range of employment options and room for advancement. A few are open for specialisation, some of which include finance, logistics, automobile, marketing, and human resource management.The candidate has an opportunity for a job at any level of management depending on the interest and specialisation of the MBA candidate, a variety of campus placement drives are also a golden opportunity for the best placement in any of the aforementioned working areas. The average package could be expected to lie around INR 3 LPA- INR 5 LPA. The highest package could lie around INR 6LPA –INR 7 LPA. Top recruiters are VI!, Microsoft, Larsen Tourbo, Indusinsight, Mahindra Rise etc.

faqs.question: Which are the top companies that take part of the placement drive at Pratap University?
faqs.answer: Pratap University has tie-ups with big companies like Oracle and Microsoft for placement of the students, Companies like Genpact, JBM, Birla Soft, HCL Technologies, Betasoft, Huawei, Su-Kam, Interglobe Technologies, etc. come as recruiters in the University.

hostel.description: Pratap University offers comprehensive hostel facilities for boys and girls separately within the University Campus.Caring wardens and a vigilant security ensures a pleasant stay allowing students to focus on academics. The air-conditioned residential apartment suites consist of single rooms with an attached bathroom and sitting lounge equipped with sofa, cable TV and refrigerator. Normal Non-A/C and AC hostel rooms are also available. The life in hostels enables students to spend ample time in the institutes, utilize library and other facilities to ensure they develop academically and acquire the necessary skills that can be obtained only through experience.

library.description: University's Central library is fully automated & well stocked with more than 35 thousand books which provides access to a large spectrum of text and reference books of Indian and foreign authors, besides e-journals, a number of journals, magazines, periodicals, information bulletins and news papers. The Central Library is presently headed by Mr. Suraj Pal, Department of Library Science.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with Pratap University currently because of its faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, hostel, indoor games, and many essential facilities are provided in the college. Hostel food is quite nice compared to others, and 24/7 medical facilities are available. However, there is no sports coach. Students cannot play sports like basketball or cricket due to the lack of a coach.

reviews.review_heading: Students are playing with their future in this university by taking admission.
reviews.review_text: Till date, neither any good canteen has opened in this university nor any good food has been found in the mess. The quality of the pulses that were fed to us in the hostel mess was exactly like the food we got in jail. The teachers of the university were not at all professionals, they were just pass out students from some college university who came to this university only to get experience, he was not worried about our future at all. He said, I have received my salary, it doesn't matter to me w...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Pratap University Rajasthan Jaipur .
reviews.review_text: Great infrastructure, all facilities available like class room, canteen, Wi-Fi, library, playground. Also classrooms is too good, and canteen. Some of the facilities include well ventilated classrooms, recreational areas, hostel facility for boys and girls, indoor and outdoor games, stocked library.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was not good. The facility was not good, and the food served was very dirty, and the infrastructure was also not good. Bed was broken, and there were no good things in the rooms. The condition of room was also not good, and water condition was also not good. The washrooms were not clean.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for B.Pharma students, and the placements in 2021 were good.
reviews.review_text: The camps of Pratap University is good and has good infrastructure. Every department has practical laboratories separately. The course is well designed according to semesters. The ratio of practicals and theory is good.

reviews.review_heading: Placements in 2019 were good, and faculty members are highly expert.
reviews.review_text: Pratap University has a good infrastructure for the B.Pharma course, and laboratories and equipment are modern and have the latest design. These things make the college the best B.Pharma college in Rajasthan. Mess food quality is good, and the boys' hostel is safe with a secure environment.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with its infrastructure, and there are no placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostels of both boys and girls were good and well-maintained. There was no canteen, but there was just a mess. Classrooms were average. The library was full of course books, and we can borrow books from our chosen subjects for the end of the semester. There were labs, but they were not in working condition. The thing which was good was Wi-Fi as it was available in both the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Waste of money University I. e, PRATAP UNIVERSITY JAIPUR.
reviews.review_text: Most of the buildings are under construction, the worst infrastructure, the library doesn't have any book which is useful for students the worst lab facility, no facility provided by the college, the worst infrastructure no playground for students food given is also very bad.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good for Bachelor's programme but not for Masters's. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so bad. But I think construction still going since 2011 for hostels and mess. University infrastructure is nice but need to build some labs for training. But there is no space for playing indoor game. Hostel facilities is good but in this technical world they should provide the Wi-Fi connection in every floor of hostle for the students. This will be really helpful for upcoming candidates.

reviews.review_heading: Pratap University-Jaipur is a good college.
reviews.review_text: We have one building for numerous department such as mechanical, civil, computer science, electronics, electrical and administration. Departmental labs were not equipped. Computer Science department has some scope as compared to any other department. Lab periods are assigned just for attendance purpose, maintaining and preparing mare lab records, actual experiments are rarely performed. Wi-Fi facility is available, but most of the time it won't works, so it is assumed to be as likely as not avai...

reviews.review_heading: Join the Pratap University if you want to bunk all the class.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is still under construction. One building is completed and more than 5 out 6 buildings are still pending for the last 5 years. The management has not much money so that they can complete it. Still, the canteen is not completed since the last 5 years. There is also not a proper playground.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with my college experience and just looted up by this university.
reviews.review_text: I had faced a lot of infrastructure issue at my college as there was only one hostel building and accommodation was not enough. The labs were just for the namesake. There was only theoretical knowledge provided and no practical knowledge. I didn't do any practicals in college until the full tenure. We had to grab the knowledge from outside. I did not enjoy my college life well.

It was a good experience studying at Pratap University as the quality of education was very good. Whole environment was perfect and I really had learnt a lot from there not only in studies but also in several other extracurricular activities. Faculties were quite helpful and inspiring. Time and again several events related to several fields were organized and students from all across the country were invited. Several seminars, sports weeks, fashion shows etc. were held. Overall it was really hel... It was a good experience studying at Pratap University as the quality of education was very good. Whole environment was perfect and I really had learnt a lot from there not only in studies but also in several other extracurricular activities. Faculties were quite helpful and inspiring. Time and again several events related to several fields were organized and students from all across the country were invited. Several seminars, sports weeks, fashion shows etc. were held. Overall it was really hel...

College is good as I was in the 2nd batch of BBA, it has improved a lot in very short duration. Good faculty, good programs and extracurricular activities. It is ugc recognized and working on getting approved. The only bad thing is that they force students to take hostel. And it’s almost 40-45km from city. Travelling is hectic sometimes but otherwise it’s a good choice for BBA. College is good as I was in the 2nd batch of BBA, it has improved a lot in very short duration. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Very good college for diploma and engineering, and very friendly environment for students.

review_content.Placements: In our college, around 70 percent of students got placed in various MNC companies. The highest package offered is up to INR 8 LPA. The lowest package offered is INR 3.5 LPA. And the average package offered is INR 6 LPA. The top recruitment companies in our course are TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. Around 60 percent of students get internships from various colleges. Roles offered include software development, testers, and full-stack development.
review_content.Infrastructure: Students are provided with various facilities like Wi-Fi connections, many labs with computers from different departments, a common canteen, and a library with many facilities. The library consists of many books and provides various facilities. Hostels are well maintained and clean. The food in the canteen is well cooked, and they maintain hygiene. The college celebrates sports events every year with so much fun and joy.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The placements are good compared to other colleges.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of student got placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Companies like TCS, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Sankey Solutions, etc., come here. 10% of students got internships in Pantagon Space. Software developer is the top role offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has very good facilities. It has 4 to 5 computer labs, 2 libraries, and an internet lab with 100 PCs. The network is good. Such labs are not available in any other college.
review_content.Faculty: Every teacher is knowledgeable and well-qualified. They are M.Tech qualified and have 15 years of experience. Teachers help students to improve their knowledge and experience.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfying and great college .

content.Placements: There is very good placement of students in various big industries, and the facilities are motivating. Many campus drives are arranged and very good companies come to drive and offer very high packages for students and most of the students are selected for companies.
content.Infrastructure: The labs for experiments and workshops are very good. The hostel facility is pretty good, and the best part is the digital classrooms and well-prepared lab to perform the experiments. And every floor has a Wi-Fi connection, due to which access to the internet is easy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My opinion on my College Campus.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my course is 15% and the highest package offered in the course is 4 LPA and average package offered in the course is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are QSpider and Profound. Percentage of students getting internship is 30-35%. Top roles offered in the course are software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The college is spread in big area. The college has different buildings for different courses. The college has Wi-Fi connection available for everyone to use upto 1Gb per day. Each Labs has 30+ computers. The quality of food in mess and canteen is not too good .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Very good college for diploma and engineering, and very friendly environment for students.

content.Placements: In our college, around 70 percent of students got placed in various MNC companies. The highest package offered is up to INR 8 LPA. The lowest package offered is INR 3.5 LPA. And the average package offered is INR 6 LPA. The top recruitment companies in our course are TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. Around 60 percent of students get internships from various colleges. Roles offered include software development, testers, and full-stack development.
content.Infrastructure: Students are provided with various facilities like Wi-Fi connections, many labs with computers from different departments, a common canteen, and a library with many facilities. The library consists of many books and provides various facilities. Hostels are well maintained and clean. The food in the canteen is well cooked, and they maintain hygiene. The college celebrates sports events every year with so much fun and joy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The placements are good compared to other colleges.

content.Placements: Around 60% of student got placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Companies like TCS, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Sankey Solutions, etc., come here. 10% of students got internships in Pantagon Space. Software developer is the top role offered.
content.Infrastructure: The college has very good facilities. It has 4 to 5 computer labs, 2 libraries, and an internet lab with 100 PCs. The network is good. Such labs are not available in any other college.
content.Faculty: Every teacher is knowledgeable and well-qualified. They are M.Tech qualified and have 15 years of experience. Teachers help students to improve their knowledge and experience.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of A.G. Patil Institute of Technology, Soregaon.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students have been placed in companies. The passing percentage is 95%. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has nine buildings. There are two hostels, one for boys and one for girls, one canteen, and a diploma building. There is one main building for mechanical engineering and civil engineering and another building for general science and E&TC. Wi-Fi is also available on campus. A lab with 100 computers is also available. There are two workshops and one library. The canteen and sports room are also provided.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: How can I get into A.G. Patil Institute of Technology, Soregaon for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
A.G. Patil Institute of Technology, Soregaon has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor Degree in the relevant field from AICTE or Central or State Government approved institutions or equivalent, with above mentioned marks (at least 45% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and persons with disability belonging to Maharashtra State only).
For sponsored candidates, candidate must have minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the college because of bad placements and campus.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements for our batch and our senior's batch. When any student got a job on their own, the college sought their information and claimed it as college placement. Not a single company visited for our batch. There is a placement cell but it's not worthy at all.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was no Wi-Fi facility in the campus till 2013 when our batch was passing out of college, but after that, the college provided that facility. Labs are there for almost every stream, and there is good machinery in the mechanical workshop. Computer labs are above average, and hostel service was not available then. A small canteen was there with average quality of food.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in all aspects.

content.Placements: Our seniors got placed in accounting companies in Gurugram. Almost 80% of students got placed on campus. Almost 70% of students got internships from our course. The average salary package offered in our course ranges between 1 LPA - 1.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is well-managed by teaching and non-teaching staff. Our college has a huge green ground. Wi-Fi is available on campus. All hostels are clean and hygienic. reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with my college because of our placement in 2023.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi range is not available, and the password is also not given. Facilities in the hostel are quite good, and the food was average. reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good environment and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available almost all over the campus. The library has plenty of books. Classrooms are well maintained, and some are digital. The canteen is not good. The mess doesn't serve good food. However, there are plenty of mess halls nearby that deliver the food on time. The sports faculty is average, although you will get all equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities are provided. I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the facilities that our college provides is hostel, canteen and mess for hostel students library for students. Ground for various sports such as cricket and kabaddi Kho-kho. College provides free Wi-Fi for students and departments. Labs are there for practical.

reviews.review_heading: Its a good college if you have low marks but want to be an engineer .
reviews.review_text: My course name is B.Tech in E&TC. There is separate department in our college building for my course. The laboratory are highly equipped with the latest equipments and teaching staff is easily accessible. All the labs have internet connection os provided. Hostel is also provided with nice rooms and internet connection with clean drinking water.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied, and there are good placements.
reviews.review_text: It is a good campus compared to all other colleges. The infrastructure and facilities provided are excellent. The wireless fidelity (Wi-Fi) is available 24x7 for all the members of the college. Various labs are provided for different subjects and different departments.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has a huge central library for students. The campus is very nice. Whoever visits the college will love the campus very much. The college has a huge playground. There are many labs for each department according to their subjects. The canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Education and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi to each student so that they can improve their knowledge by using the internet. The college has a separate library and a different section for each course. Hostel facilities are good for girls' security, and they fulfil all needs.

reviews.review_heading: Dr. Daulatrao Aher College of Engineering, Karad is a really good college for the future generation.
reviews.review_text: Our college has construction engineering, structural engineering, land development, etc., courses. Good quality facilities are provided in our hostels, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is delicious. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: This college is really good.
reviews.review_text: The library is good here, but all books are not available. However, there are more options in the library. Sitting arrangements in the library and lab are nice. The food served in the canteen is healthy, and the cafeteria is really nice. The sports event is arranged on the campus. The hostel is nice. This college area is nice, and the campus is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Almost 26 students are recruited by placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a Wi-Fi facility. All facilities are provided here. The sports ground is available here. For practicals, chemistry lab, physics lab, HMT Lab, TOM Lab, FM Lab, ATD Lab, and all ME labs for all mechanical department subjects are available here. You are practising in all events conducted by the college and outside the college. All festivals are celebrated in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of placements, but it has good faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure will be very nice. Our college has a very good playground and a huge library. The quality of the hostel will be good and has very good facilities. Sports kits are available. Our college has a medical facility, and an ambulance available is during a medical emergency. The library has different books to gain knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides enough placements with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. Labs are well-structured and equipped with machines. Classrooms in the college are big. The library has its separate building and is equipped with lots of books, journals, and study materials. The college has a sports ground with lots of greenery and a separate gymkhana. All games are played under the guidance of the university.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Daulatrao Aher College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was decent. The facilities are, of course, decent, like libraries and classrooms. The college did not have a mess on campus, and the cafeteria was very low-budget. The sports facilities were the best, and the sports curriculum was the best.

reviews.review_heading: Good Campus with great faculty.
reviews.review_text: For different departments there are different floors. In total, there are four departments namely Mechanical, Civil, E and TC, CSE. Every Dept. has their spacious labs with all the equipment. It has Wi-Fi Campus with daily 2 GB Data. Each Classroom has a projector for digital education. review_content.Placements: There are simply zero placements. On the name of placement, they call fake companies and advertise that in newspapers. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied because there were no placements.

content.Placements: No one got placed from my batch. I have done mechanical engineering from this college in 2015, and I got 65% at that time. Not even one company visited the college for placements, but for electronics, only Micromax came from Uttarakhand. They took students at the worker level, no one got placed in the professional line.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is okay. The Wi-Fi facility is provided for hostlers only, and the rooms are good in hostel including A/C facility. The labs and classrooms are good, but there was a shortage of lecturers. The canteen food was not good at my time. The staff of the college is not cooperative, they take a lot of fine on late payment of fee and for shortage of attendance.

admission_process.title: Bharatesh Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Bharatesh Institute of Technology admission is entrance-based for its courses. Further, the college offers merit-based admission to candidates belonging to the management quota. The college offers one course at the UG level i.e B.E. Aspirants, willing to apply toBharatesh Institute of Technologyin B.E. must register for entrance exams and appear for the same. The college offers a B.E. degree affiliated withVisvesvaraya Technological University. After filling out the criteria set by the college, candidates must visit the college's official website for admission. To know the latest information related to Bharatesh Institute of Technology admission 2025, go through the below sections:

Bharatesh Institute of Technology admission is entrance-based for B.E. courses offered at the UG level. Candidates are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria to get admission to B.E.. The institute offers admission to B.E. based on the CET, COMDEK, JEE Main and other exams. The table below listsBharatesh Institute of Technology courseeligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 in Science and have English as a subject with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
CET,COMDEK,JEE Main
Note: Bharatesh Institute of Technology offers merit-based admission via Management Quta

Bharatesh Institute of Technology admission process 2025is open for all courses. The institute offers entrance-based admission to B.E.. Candidates must complete the admission process. Check below for theBharatesh Institute of Technology's admission process 2025:
Step 1: Bharatesh Institute of Technology Application Process 2025

Candidates belonging to the management quota are required to apply online on the official website of Bharatesh Institute of Technology. Further, for admission to the non-management quota category, the admission process is carried out through the Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA). It must be noted that the eligible candidates must have completed theentrance examformalities & must have qualified the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the University.
Step 2: Bharatesh Institute of Technology Selection Process 2025

Admission to the B.E. isentrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes CET, COMDEK, JEE Main and other entrance exams for admission to B.E.. Further, admission via management quota is based on the last-qualifying exam score.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for document verification. Selected candidates need to payBharatesh Institute of Technology course feeto confirm their admission.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BE at Bharatesh Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Bharatesh Institute of Technology BE fee is range between INR 5.4 Lacs - INR 5.8 lakh. Candidates are required to pay the tuition fees for both years separately. Additionally, candidate applicants also have to pay the non-refundable application fee.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BE at Bharatesh Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: The total seat intake for B.E. courses at Bharatesh Institute of Technology is 180. Candidates must have completed Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks from a recognised board to be eligible to apply for admission. Additionally, candidates seeking government quota seats are required to apply for and take the entrance exam accepted by the institute. After meeting these criteria, candidates must fill out the application form online.

faqs.question: When does Bharatesh Institute of Technology admission start?
faqs.answer: Bharatesh Institute of Technology admission start once the results of the COMEDK UGET entrance exam and the CET entrance exam reults are out. Candidates applying for admission into the programme should note that COMEDK UGET entrance exam takes place in May and CET entrance exam takes place in April. Aspirants should keep checking the institute website to get an idea of the upcoming dates of admission.

faqs.question: How does Bharatesh Institute of Technology select students for admission?
faqs.answer: The admission process for the BE programme at Bharatesh Institute of Technology differs for Government and Management quota seats. For Government quota seats, admission is based on entrance exams conducted by the Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA). Further, admission to Management quota seats is merit-based. Candidates interested in the Management quota should fill out the application form on the institute's official website. To be eligible for admission under either quota, candidates must meet the basic eligibility and selection criteria set by the college. If candidates fulfill all requirements and successfully clear the selection round, they will have a better chance of securing admission.

faqs.question: Which courses are offered at Bharatesh Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Bharatesh Institute of Technology offered BEin full-time mode. The course is offered in various specialisations. These specialisations include Communication Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Information Technology Engineering and Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Engineering. The duration of the course is four years. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to fullfill the criteria set by the college.

faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted by Bharatesh Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Bharatesh Institute of Technology admission is entrance-based for its courses. It offers one course i.e. BE at UG level. For Bharatesh Institute of Technology BE admissions, candidates are required to appear for various exams such as CET, COMDEK, and JEE Main. Further, for management quota, admission is based on the last qualifying exam. Candidates can apply online mode for admission.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Camelia Institute of Technology and Management.

review_content.Placements: Last year, 85% of the students were placed, and most of the companies visited the college. TCS, Eccomplify, and Infosys are some of the major companies which visited our campus. Most of the seniors were placed in these companies. Some of the seniors also got placed in pool campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is one the best compared to any other colleges under WBJEE. It has spacious classrooms. The college also has a very big field for sports and other cocurricular activities. The college also have a very big library. The college also has a canteen with some of the best foods.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good and very friendly. I recommend you join this college.

review_content.Placements: More or less than 10-12 students from our course got a job on campus. Our college is very helpful. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. We all did an internship in some companies for a month or two. Mainly some survey and construction companies visit our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is very well decorated. Classrooms are clean and hygienic. Labs are well-equipped. The library has sufficient books for all students to take away for their home study. The hostel facility for boys is available only on the campus. The canteen is also available for the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Is Private College A Good Choice?

content.Placements: Till the second year, we were informed about placement, but none of our seniors got any till now. There is no word like placement in there. You could only get a job if you had some connection to the company's employees. The best you can get is through your senior help.
content.Infrastructure: At Camellia, facilities such as the library and hostel were good as compared to the lab. The food at the hostel was average, but the quantity was great. The equipment in the labs is outdated, and teachers were to lazy to work on it. Sports, games, and medical facilities were far better than anything.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best and lush green campuses, but campus placements are not up to the mark.

content.Placements: In our batch, a very low salary package was offered to our students, like 9,500 to 15,000 per month. Some BPO jobs were also offered to some students. The placement cell is pathetic in their service. Only tier-3 companies and some consultancies come to this college for campusing.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel accommodation was good, but the food was very bad. The first-aid facility was available. The library is of state-of-the-art quality. Labs are spacious and full of instruments, and classrooms are also neat and clean. All practicals are performed, and instructors are helpful.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Camelia Institute of Technology and Management.

content.Placements: Last year, 85% of the students were placed, and most of the companies visited the college. TCS, Eccomplify, and Infosys are some of the major companies which visited our campus. Most of the seniors were placed in these companies. Some of the seniors also got placed in pool campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is one the best compared to any other colleges under WBJEE. It has spacious classrooms. The college also has a very big field for sports and other cocurricular activities. The college also have a very big library. The college also has a canteen with some of the best foods.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good and very friendly. I recommend you join this college.

content.Placements: More or less than 10-12 students from our course got a job on campus. Our college is very helpful. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. We all did an internship in some companies for a month or two. Mainly some survey and construction companies visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is very well decorated. Classrooms are clean and hygienic. Labs are well-equipped. The library has sufficient books for all students to take away for their home study. The hostel facility for boys is available only on the campus. The canteen is also available for the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Ambient environment for a good career growth.

content.Placements: Above 50% of the students were placed in my course. The average salary offered is 20 k. Tata group and JSW steel were top recruiters. Engineer role was offered. About above 90% of students got internships. Each year students were placed in various companies according to their interest.
content.Infrastructure: Very nice facilities are there like advanced classrooms, Wi-Fi campus, projector study facility, good management, library, mess, Boys and girls hostel, playground. The labs are well-equipped with all the necessary types of equipment.

paragraphs: Camellia Institute of Technology and Management admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Camellia Institute of Technology and Management is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Camellia Institute of Technology and Management Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at this link, i.e., https://camelliait.ac.in/apply_online.php. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute considers entrance exam scores such as JEE Main, JEXPO for UG and Diploma course admission. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theCamellia Institute of Technology and Management feeto confirm their seats in the institute.

highlights.summary: The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for University College of Engineering, Thirukkuvalai admission to BE/BTech courses.

faqs.answer:
A:    University College of Engineering, Thirukkuvalai has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.review_title: There are placements in our college, and you have to work hard to get placed.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate is 30%. The package offered is 3 LPA. Eco-Tech is the top hiring company. No internships are provided. You should go out for an internship. You can go for off-campus placements also. Software engineer is the best role offered in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available. There is no Wi-Fi in our college. You must submit a letter to access Wi-Fi. There is no canteen in this college. Food is not available in the college for day scholars. They must go out to have food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It is not recommended for genius students but recommended for those who are interested in sports.

review_content.Placements: Our college is good for students to get placement opportunities. None of the companies will visit our college except for the companies related to the marketing domain, which are irrelevant to our studies. They hire most of the students like about 80% of the students who attend the interview. Placements are not well supported here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has all the facilities which a normal engineering college should have. It allows you to go to the library, where you can access computers with the internet facility and many more facilities. The sports event will be organised every year in our college. There is a chance for all students to participate in sports. If you perform well, then you will get a chance to participate in national level sports. Our college provides the hostel, which is good but not highly preferable because the food is the same daily, and there won't be any changes in it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for students who have a weak financial status.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 70% of students get passed out every year. The highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. Top roles are offered to the students, and we are more eligible for that. There are five courses offered in our college. Internships are also provided on our own interest.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has good hostel facilities, and healthy food is provided in the mess. Medical facilities are available here, and we have sports and games with regular practices. Our college has lab facilities and internet lab facilities, and we use it by permission.

overview_faqs.question: Is University College of Engineering, Thirukkuvalai worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at University College of Engineering, Thirukkuvalai are B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: University College of Engineering, Thirukkuvalai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college was absolutely good because of faculty members and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Many students were placed in top companies with salary packages of 4 LPA. Students also attend many internships and workshops to strengthen their courses from many colleges like NIT and top colleges in Tamilnadu. Every year, they attend many workshops.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the hostel was good, RO water was available, and a good mess with quality food. Sports day was also conducted every even semester. Wi-Fi facility was also available and a good library to read and refer to. Sports were also very good. Every year, students participate in many events and win prizes.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: There are placements in our college, and you have to work hard to get placed.

content.Placements: The placement rate is 30%. The package offered is 3 LPA. Eco-Tech is the top hiring company. No internships are provided. You should go out for an internship. You can go for off-campus placements also. Software engineer is the best role offered in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available. There is no Wi-Fi in our college. You must submit a letter to access Wi-Fi. There is no canteen in this college. Food is not available in the college for day scholars. They must go out to have food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is not recommended for genius students but recommended for those who are interested in sports.

content.Placements: Our college is good for students to get placement opportunities. None of the companies will visit our college except for the companies related to the marketing domain, which are irrelevant to our studies. They hire most of the students like about 80% of the students who attend the interview. Placements are not well supported here.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has all the facilities which a normal engineering college should have. It allows you to go to the library, where you can access computers with the internet facility and many more facilities. The sports event will be organised every year in our college. There is a chance for all students to participate in sports. If you perform well, then you will get a chance to participate in national level sports. Our college provides the hostel, which is good but not highly preferable because the food is the same daily, and there won't be any changes in it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for students who have a weak financial status.

content.Placements: Nearly 70% of students get passed out every year. The highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. Top roles are offered to the students, and we are more eligible for that. There are five courses offered in our college. Internships are also provided on our own interest.
content.Infrastructure: It has good hostel facilities, and healthy food is provided in the mess. Medical facilities are available here, and we have sports and games with regular practices. Our college has lab facilities and internet lab facilities, and we use it by permission.

faqs.answer:
University College of Engineering, Thirukkuvalai has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is best for agriculture course but not good for engineering and has no good facilities.

review_content.Placements: Our college has limited or no placements till now, and students who have focused on learning skills and through their efforts have secured packages around 1.5 lakh-3 lakh per annum, not through the college but by cracking the company interviews. They have been through companies like Entoo, Wipro, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure has no proper working instruments, and the computers need 10 minutes to get started. There is no Wi-Fi, and the canteen and mess facilities are poor. Classrooms are the worst as benches are placed at the sides, and fans are placed in between, which is of no use; the rooms are of very bad quality.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Students cannot enjoy college life here.

review_content.Placements: Our senior says placements are okay, because they could find a good company for them. It offers a low package, but the college provides training for skills development in the last year of engineering. The college is excellent for the agricultural course, and if students have an interest, then they can join it. But for engineering, students have to think about it.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, but according to my friends who stay in the college hostel, they say some good things about the hostel. It provides quality food. In the evening, students do some exercise. Cleaning the ground is done. Students can enjoy themselves with friends. If students are from different districts, then without thinking, they can join the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I think there are many good colleges to try for. It is not a bad college.

review_content.Placements: Since I took admission in this college, I haven't seen any company that visited our college. Our seniors also said that in this college, there are no placements. If we have skills, we will get jobs, or else not, so I recommend students to go to a good college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good and not bad.
review_content.Faculty: In this college, the only good thing is our faculty members. They are the best. They help us to improve and score good marks. Faculty members are good. I suggest students get admission to gain a good knowledge. Our college has one of the best faculty members, but everything is up to us. If we have some talent, then we can get a placement. It is good at teaching.

college_info.intro: Kishkinda University Ballari offers various programmes across UG, PG and Diploma levels such as BTech, MTech, BCom, BBA and BCA. University provides these courses based on the eligibility criteria of merit and entrance. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 and qualify suggested entrance exams such as COMED-K, AIEEE, K-CET, KUSAT and Management Quota. According to the responses and stats, Kishkinda University offers BTech, BCom, BBA and BCA as popular programmes in full-time mode. To learn more about the Kishkinda University Ballari popular programmes, check out the table below:

These courses are offered full-time for 2 to 5 years with BTech, MBA, BCom and BBA courses as the popular programmes. Kishkinda University Ballari conducts admission based on merit and entrance. The criteria of merit-based and entrance-based may differ, depending on the courses opted for. Kishkinda Ballari courses are offered with total tuition fees ranging from INR 1.2 Lakh to INR 1046 Lakh. For admission, candidates are shortlisted based on merit results or valid entrance exam scores. admission_overview.college_name: Kishkinda University Ballari Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility & Selection Process, Application Process

paragraphs: Kishkinda University admission 2025is primarily entrance-based. The admission process of the university commences offline. Students can visit the university campus to know more about the programme of choice.Kishkinda Universityprovides several undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma programmes. These courses are provided in the fields of Science, Technology, Computer Applications, etc. The university provides several specialisations for its courses. Interested students can read the following article to learn more about the courses, eligibility, and admission process of Kishkinda University.

Kishkinda University course admissionis done based on several factors. The university shortlists candidates based on entrance exam scores, and past academic performance, among other criteria. Students can also apply via Management Quota. Aspirants must meet the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for any of the offered courses. The university also conducts its entrance test called asKishkinda University Scholastic Aptitude Test(KUSAT). Aspiring candidates can check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularKishkinda University courses:

To get into any of the courses offered at Kishkinda University, students must meet the course-wise admission criteria. The process includes several steps, such as application, selection rounds, counselling (if applicable), and admission confirmation. Interested students can follow the below-mentioned step-by-stepKishkinda University admission process:
Step 1: Kishkinda University Application Process
Visit the university admission office and acquire all the required information. Select the programme and specialisation you seek to pursue and submit the required documents.
Step 2:Kishkinda University Selection Process

The university shortlists students based on various parameters. For certain courses, admissions are entrance-based, while for BCA students are selected on the basis of past academic merit. The university selects students based on a valid score in the accepted entrance exam (Karnataka PGCET, KCET, etc.) Furthermore, a certain percentage of seats are reserved for students enrolling via the Management Quota too.
Step 2:Kishkinda University Admission Confirmation
Students must pay the admission fee to secure their spot at the university.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Kishkinda University?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get direct admission at Kishkinda University through Management Quota. The university generally accepts students based on entrance exam scores followed by counselling (if applicable). However, it also reserves a certain amount of the total seat intake for students applying via the Management Quota. This is applicable for both Karnataka and non-Karnataka students. Candidates looking to apply directly are advised to get in contact with the admission office of the university to know more about the admission procedure.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BBA at Kishkinda University, Ballari?
faqs.answer: Kishkinda University Ballari offers BBA as a 3-year course. The University offers it based on merit. Candidates must apply for admission to BBA through the official website of the University. After a successful application process, candidates are shortlisted based on merit. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 from a recognised board.

review_content.Placements: Our college is one of the top 50 colleges in Kerala. More than 70% of students got placed in our college for our course. review_summary.college_name: Universal Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Average experience with limited placements and basic facilities.

content.Placements: I am a student of the CSE department at Universal Engineering College, Thrissur graduated in 2025. Placements are poor in this college. 40 percent students in our CSE batch were placed through campus recruitment. The highest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Q Spiders, and Movate. Internship opportunities are very low as they do not provide any internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Facility and infrastructure are average. The department has access to Wi-Fi, computer labs, and classrooms. While labs are functional for coursework, they may lack some of the latest hardware and software tools. The library is decent. The hostel is inside the college, which is convenient for students. However, the overall quality of hostel facilities is average. Rooms are manageable but not very spacious. One major concern is that food is not provided on holidays or off days unless the canteen is open, in such cases, meals are given to hostellers. This can be convenient for students staying on campus full-time. Mess and canteen food quality is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Promotes sports and less strict.

content.Placements: Good placement percentage except for CSE. For the other departments, placements are almost 100%. Faculty members help students to get placed and give support even after graduation. Not many companies come to the college we have to try hard and get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are average. Also, it's inside the college compound. Cannot accommodate that many students. Also, there are strict rules that need to be followed. Canteen services are also not that great. It's average recently close the snacks bar that is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied and good.

content.Placements: Our college is one of the top 50 colleges in Kerala. More than 70% of students got placed in our college for our course. Top companies are UST Global, Erasmith, Qspiders, OnFlap Technologies, and Thinkpalm Technologies. A lot of internship opportunities are offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: Can't say it's perfect but it's developing. It's way better than what it was 5 years back. It has well maintained hostel and classrooms. We have good availability of books in library as well as food from the college canteen. College also supports sports for students like cricket, football, volleyball, kho, badminton, etc., with practice for both boys and girls.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with sports academics and learning facilities send better placement.

content.Placements: In my class, 70% of students are placed in different companies. The highest package is around 4. 5 lakhs, while the lowest is 2. 7 lakhs per annum. The top recruiting companies are primarily from Technopark. About 30% of students secured internships for six months at Qspiders in Bangalore. The top role offered is software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is rated 4 out of 5, and they provide free Wi-Fi throughout the campus. They also offer high-quality education by integrating smart learning in the classroom. Students can access the library, which features a smart library. Our college is well-known for its sports achievements in university games and provides supportive facilities for athletics. The canteen facilities, in my opinion, are not very good, rated 2 out of 5, and below average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everything is okay in college.

content.Placements: I have not passed out so I don't know better about placements. However, everyone says CSE has better placements. I have not gone for internships, so I don't know better about it. I think the highest salary is Rs. 20,000 per month. I don't know exactly about it, and one thing I assure is the management here is good.
content.Infrastructure: The college facilities and infrastructures are just okay. We have free campus Wi-Fi in the college but when compared to other engineering colleges, facilites provided here are average. However, I guarantee we have good freedom and better programs here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Universal Engineering College.
