reviews_list.review_title: If you want to get a degree, then you are welcome here, but placements are unavailable.

review_content.Placements: Placements in college are not good. So if you only want to study and get a degree, then it is your kind of college. You will hear about only TCS and some other IT companies when it comes to the placements. If you are in some other branches like mechanical or civil, then you have no scope of placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the front building is good, and that is what is visible from the front. But remaining other department buildings are just built wherever they got the place. The condition of the gym is not good. There was certain fake information at the prospectus related to infrastructure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of our faculty members.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate is around 90%. The highest salary package offered was Rs. 35,000 per month. The average academic score of the students was 92%. Many companies such as Wipro, TCS, Capgemini, ANA, and Textron etc., visit the campus for placements. Around 90% of the students got placed from our batch. The lowest salary package offered was Rs. 14,000 per month. Students are mostly offered the roles of a software engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is also available in the labs. You can use it anytime. Mobiles and headphones are also allowed on the campus. Our classrooms are well-maintained. Quality of food served is also good. I didn't face any issues during my tenure at the college.

overview_faqs.question: Is Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institution for B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 4.2 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 4 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 4.5 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and curriculum.

content.Placements: 100% placement is offered on the campus. The highest package is 9 Lacs per annum and the lowest is 2.5 Lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro etc. All the students get internship in good companies. Faculty members are very supportive.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is very good and has great infrastructure. Fully Wi-Fi enabled campus is provided for the students. Good labs, classroom and library are provided for the students. The hostel is well furnished and single occupancy is provided. Canteen, medical and sports facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college, and I believe that this is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.

content.Placements: About 60 students are placed in this course. The highest salary package offered is about 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2-3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, TCS, Microsoft, Yahoo, etc. There are very good lab facilities and very well knowledgeable faculty members. The salary package offered in our course is 3-6 LPA. About 40% of the students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is better than all the other colleges in Lucknow. Classrooms are highly digitalised. Labs are very good to perform practicals. Hostel and accommodation is nice as per the charges. Mess service is really great.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: If you want to get a degree, then you are welcome here, but placements are unavailable.

content.Placements: Placements in college are not good. So if you only want to study and get a degree, then it is your kind of college. You will hear about only TCS and some other IT companies when it comes to the placements. If you are in some other branches like mechanical or civil, then you have no scope of placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the front building is good, and that is what is visible from the front. But remaining other department buildings are just built wherever they got the place. The condition of the gym is not good. There was certain fake information at the prospectus related to infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of our faculty members.

content.Placements: The placement rate is around 90%. The highest salary package offered was Rs. 35,000 per month. The average academic score of the students was 92%. Many companies such as Wipro, TCS, Capgemini, ANA, and Textron etc., visit the campus for placements. Around 90% of the students got placed from our batch. The lowest salary package offered was Rs. 14,000 per month. Students are mostly offered the roles of a software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is also available in the labs. You can use it anytime. Mobiles and headphones are also allowed on the campus. Our classrooms are well-maintained. Quality of food served is also good. I didn't face any issues during my tenure at the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The review of SRMS College of Engineering and Technology (SRMSCET Lucknow).

content.Placements: Our college offers 100% placements in good companies. The placement head is very co-operative. They also help students in enhancing their skills and crack any type of interview and face any competitions. They prepare students well to build their careers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Rooms are allocated on single-occupancy bases, and each room is available with attached washrooms. Each floor has its own common room along with TV facilities. Every room is enabled with the LAN facility. All the classrooms available here are air-conditioned. The food served here is tasty and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very good and has great infrastructure. Fully Wi-Fi enabled campus is provided for the students. Good labs, classroom and library are provided for the students. The hostel is well furnished and single occupancy is provided. Canteen, medical and sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college, and I believe that this is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is better than all the other colleges in Lucknow. Classrooms are highly digitalised. Labs are very good to perform practicals. Hostel and accommodation is nice as per the charges. Mess service is really great.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to get a degree, then you are welcome here, but placements are unavailable.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the front building is good, and that is what is visible from the front. But remaining other department buildings are just built wherever they got the place. The condition of the gym is not good. There was certain fake information at the prospectus related to infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of our faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is also available in the labs. You can use it anytime. Mobiles and headphones are also allowed on the campus. Our classrooms are well-maintained. Quality of food served is also good. I didn't face any issues during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: The review of SRMS College of Engineering and Technology (SRMSCET Lucknow).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Rooms are allocated on single-occupancy bases, and each room is available with attached washrooms. Each floor has its own common room along with TV facilities. Every room is enabled with the LAN facility. All the classrooms available here are air-conditioned. The food served here is tasty and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRMSCET, Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good with Wi-Fi enabled and well-equipped labs. Wi-Fi routers are placed everywhere on the campus with good bandwidth. Classrooms are spacious and have good quality benches and board. Seminar halls in the college are good. Labs are well-equipped with the latest equipment. Food provided is better than most of the colleges.

reviews.review_heading: SRMS Bareilly Review, A must go college for all geeks who want to earn scholarship every semester.
reviews.review_text: Infra was awesome, SRMS was having the biggest campus in Bareilly. Medical college was also accessible and close to engineering campus. There was temple too, hostel, professor's apartment also in vicinity, Whole place was identified with the name of Shri ram murti.

reviews.review_heading: College life and enjoy and take placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure here is good there is well-equipped lab and seminar room, library some other rooms have AC in sports there is circlet, football, tennis, squash, volleyball, basketball etc. Stadium which help you to remove stress. Zest and ammod two cultural fest are organised here for entertainment and tecvyom and comptech are for your to check technical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent environment and a place to nurture yourself under strict rules.
reviews.review_text: The college has an excellent infrastructure, with the availability of all modern equipment. Since the campus was established in 2011 itself, it is a modern one. The classrooms have comfortable seats and projector facilities. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The canteen is not much adequate, but students can go out after the college hours and enjoy delicious items from the outskirts of Lucknow. The college maintains a sports ground, basketball court, multi-purpose hall for carrom, chess, badmin...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good with the good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college is provided with the Wi-Fi facility to enable digital, extra learning, and experiences. The highly updated labs and library are for the students to enhance the liberal learning. The medical facilities are available, and the dispensary is available for any emergency. For physical fitness and sports, there are the activities in the sports area MPH. The canteen and the mess are included for the students and the faculty members. The hostel is provided for the students from the outside.

reviews.review_heading: The condition of the private college and their reality.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college was average.
There was only one major building, and the rest of the college is always under construction. The labs were also not properly build and no security instalments in the lab.
The hostels were pathetic, and no cleaning was done regularly in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Strict for studies and good as compared to other private colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college has an awesome infrastructure. All the facilities are available, sports, medical, the hostel is good and always serve healthy food. The laboratories are clean and equipped with all required equipment, and numerous computers are there and labs, so you will never worry about the internet and stuff related to it.  The classrooms, auditorium, playgrounds and everything are perfect.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a fantastic college.
reviews.review_text: The college has an awesome infrastructure. Also, its auditorium is far better than the PVR cinemas. The libraries also open until 11 pm. There are also canteens and parks which are good. There will be an ECO-friendly environment with excellent labs for all branches, especially for the automobile labs. Also, the CS labs are quite excellent. Overall, the ratings of the college are good.

reviews.review_heading: SRMS review from a B.Tech student.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and impressive. There is space for everything like sports, gym, temple, small shops and a canteen. The garden is good with a variety of plants. We have a very large parking area. It is a really good place to spend some time with your friends along with studies. This college is located on the outskirts of Bareilly and is calm.

reviews.review_heading: My memory lane with the college.
reviews.review_text:
It has good infrastructure in terms of classes, labs and training development cell. The trainers are always there to help students to make them up to date according to the market. 
They plan many visits to the corporate industry for the students to learn about the IT culture and its work environment.

review_content.Placements: Most of the companies coming with placements opportunities are IT companies, mainly it is TCS. Mainly students go for short-period paid internships. The internships availed for students at CIPET, which is a central government institution. The course fee is Rs 2,500 which covered the topics of injection molding and CNC. To get placed in the desired field of their respective course students have to take an extra course in that field. Our college avails mock interviews and seminars to help with placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, Wi-Fi is not enabled for students. The campus has a peaceful environment, with surveillance of CCTV cameras, and security guards. Our college has zero tolerance for ragging, fighting, on-campus politics, etc. Most of the laboratories are functional. The quality of food is average, not everyone would love the food. There are separate hostels for girls and boys, which are close to the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good to join.

review_content.Placements: The way they are giving CRT training is good. But the companies they are taking to college hire only a few members. However, the training they are giving is very useful outside as well, and learning the subjects is a very easy way to understand the syllabus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is inside the college; the infrastructure and everything are okay. The restrictions are also very strict, and the hostels are near the college building. It is an autonomous college, and the staff members are good. We get good knowledge from the college library, which is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is good, and I would recommend students to join this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are very good. The placement cell appoints external faculty to provide training. From our department, 35% of students get placed in top reputed companies such as Mindtree, Zoho, and BYJU'S. There is one drawback. They charge extra fees for providing placement training.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good. It is built on 10 acres and has plenty of open space. There are volleyball and badminton courts. Each department has separate labs, and at least 40 students attend each lab session. The library offers a good collection of books.

faqs.answer: Narayana Engineering College, Gudur has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMCACandidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Decent placements and comfortable facilities.

content.Placements: Mostly 75-80 percent of students were placed in our course. The highest package offered was between 8-12 LPA, while the average package is around 4-5 LPA. Many companies visited our campus including Virtusa, Hexaware, IBM, Accenture, etc. Top roles in our course are software developer, QA automation engineer, technical support engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our course has good infrastructure with all the basic facilities needed for learning. Classrooms are very clean and spacious, equipped with projectors, proper Wi-Fi, and well-equipped labs for practical work. Hostel maintenance is not good; they provide daily evening snacks.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great placements and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Placement-wise, our college is really good. 75% of students were placed in every batch in our college. Almost all the MNC companies visited our college. The highest package offered is around 11 LPA, and the average package is 4.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: All the infrastructure and facilities are available in our course, like WI-FI connectivity, which is available in particular areas, and classrooms are very clean and neat, and labs are updated with the latest software and tools relevant to our course. Now, coming to hostel facilities, there are 4 members in one room, and it is quite spacious.

individual_reviews.title: The college is good to join.

content.Placements: The way they are giving CRT training is good. But the companies they are taking to college hire only a few members. However, the training they are giving is very useful outside as well, and learning the subjects is a very easy way to understand the syllabus.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is inside the college; the infrastructure and everything are okay. The restrictions are also very strict, and the hostels are near the college building. It is an autonomous college, and the staff members are good. We get good knowledge from the college library, which is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good, and I would recommend students to join this college.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are very good. The placement cell appoints external faculty to provide training. From our department, 35% of students get placed in top reputed companies such as Mindtree, Zoho, and BYJU'S. There is one drawback. They charge extra fees for providing placement training.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good. It is built on 10 acres and has plenty of open space. There are volleyball and badminton courts. Each department has separate labs, and at least 40 students attend each lab session. The library offers a good collection of books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements with proper maintenance.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed in our course. The highest package offered is 14 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies include HCL Technologies, L&T Infotech, and Virtusa. 60% of students get internships. Some students get internships in product-based companies such as IBM and Deloitte.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities and infrastructure available in our course include Wi-Fi access throughout the college, as well as labs with proper equipment. The classrooms are very clean, with fans, projectors, and blackboards. However, the quality of food in the college hostel is not that good.

paragraphs: Narayana Engineering College, Gudur admission2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers 13 programmes at the UG and PG levels in various fields, including Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software, etc. The mode of study for the offered courses is full time. reviews.review_heading: Decent placements and comfortable facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our course has good infrastructure with all the basic facilities needed for learning. Classrooms are very clean and spacious, equipped with projectors, proper Wi-Fi, and well-equipped labs for practical work. Hostel maintenance is not good; they provide daily evening snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Great placements and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: All the infrastructure and facilities are available in our course, like WI-FI connectivity, which is available in particular areas, and classrooms are very clean and neat, and labs are updated with the latest software and tools relevant to our course. Now, coming to hostel facilities, there are 4 members in one room, and it is quite spacious.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good to join.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is inside the college; the infrastructure and everything are okay. The restrictions are also very strict, and the hostels are near the college building. It is an autonomous college, and the staff members are good. We get good knowledge from the college library, which is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good, and I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good. It is built on 10 acres and has plenty of open space. There are volleyball and badminton courts. Each department has separate labs, and at least 40 students attend each lab session. The library offers a good collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements with proper maintenance.
reviews.review_text: All facilities and infrastructure available in our course include Wi-Fi access throughout the college, as well as labs with proper equipment. The classrooms are very clean, with fans, projectors, and blackboards. However, the quality of food in the college hostel is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure facilities for our course. The classrooms are very spacious, with projectors, fans, and proper ventilation. The entire college looks green, with lots of trees. There are also benches under the trees to sit on, which is nice during lunch and break times.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi facility and computer lab facilities, and the library, and there are departmental libraries also. In the hostel, there is also a Wi-Fi facility, and the quality of food in the hostel is somewhat better. In the canteen, the food is very good, but there are higher prices to buy.

reviews.review_heading: All over college management infrastructure and quality education everything is there ….
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was too good and peaceful with large space and greenery everywhere. Classes and projectors are also available according to campus it was good no doubts. We also have wi-Fi, campus, library. Hostel is okay, not hygiene, need to adjust food, which is also okay.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: We have an infrastructure which is pretty good. We have good libraries and classrooms, the labs are so clean and we have new systems for high performance. We are glad that we have joined this college. It is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and course curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Overall infrastructure is good be it classrooms, library, faculty and the student teacher interactions. The only negative part is labs they do have good labs but those are to be shared with B.Teach CSE people as well which leads to not abundance time to get lab facility.

reviews.review_heading: As per my two years of experience, the college had good discipline and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: My hostel facility is above average, with good infrastructure and a good atmosphere. My hostel fees are INR 62000, and the food items are both vegetarian and non-vegetarian every time, and we have playgrounds for both colleges and hostels separately. We have good labs and a central library in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with highly qualified.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in labs are very good but some systems are no working but it can be rectified within time. Library also good all types of books and journals will be available. Hostel is not good. Quality of food is very low. Canteen can charge high rate for every items. Common man cannot affordable that cost. Sports and games are conducted once a year.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good but have many issues. They can treat like inter students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in labs are very good but some systems are no working but it can be rectified within time. Library also good all types of books and journals will be available. Hostel is not good. Quality of food is very low. Canteen can charge high rate for every items. Common man cannot affordable that cost. Sports and games are conducted once a year.

reviews.review_heading: Our college had good placements in 2021, good infrastructure, and library.
reviews.review_text: Our course contains almost 10 labs, 12 classrooms, and a vast library. Wi-Fi is available in our course for 24 hours. The quality of hostels is good. The food is better, and we have a playground in the hostel. There will be medical facilities and also a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, best campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. It has two main gates and it has a big ground where many games like cricket, volleyball, badminton, basketball etc can be played.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides very good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 30% of students get placed in our college. The average salary offered is not good which is 3 LPM to 4 LPM. Around 15% of students get internships. It is an efficient college for middle-class families.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best. It provides the best lab facilities and classrooms. Wi-Fi is available in the college. Hostel has good rooms and serves healthy food. It provides joyful environment. Mess uses fresh vegetables and fruits for cooking. Medical facilities are available. It has good sports fields.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry ready. Students get accurate results. Semester exams are not easy. Around 75 students pass the exams. The pass percentage is 50%. .

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and average placement rate.

review_content.Placements: 1. About 40-50% Percent of students were placed in my course. 2. The highest package 20-30 Lacs per annum, the lowest 3-5 Lacs per annum. 3. Essar group, kec international limited etc. Are the top recruiting companies. 4. About 60% students got internship and companies are National buildings construction corporation limited (NBCC), Ultratech cement limited etc. 5. Site engineer, Estimator etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1. We have access of library where all the books related to civil and other courses are available but students don't have access of Wi-Fi in college campus but in college hostel we have free Wi-Fi available. For practical works we have lab in which we have equipment related to civil engineering and overall I want to say that college infrastructure was very good. 2. Hostel infrastructure was very good which include free Wi-Fi, RO water, Canteen, Medical first Aid box was available in warden room. I will rate mess food 3.5 out of 5. We have free access of gym also in our campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College is very good in terms of infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: I got an offer letter during the campus placements in 2022, now it is 2024 and still they have not given me a date of joining. So I think the college placements are 0 percent and no internships are provided by the college. In the last year, we have to put in a lot efforts to get a job just because of the poor placements of the college.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities given by the college are very good and excellent. The infrastructure of the college is really good in all the manners. There is no Wi-Fi for the students, but we can use it in the labs, not in the campus or in classrooms. The hostel food is just okay, not very good. Games activities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best college, I personally recommended my college.

content.Placements: 10% of students were placed in my course. The highest package is offered for about INR 17 lacs, and the lowest package is offered for about INR 3 lacs. The top recruiting companies are Wipro and Microsoft. Approximately 80% of students received internships at Wipro and Microsoft.
content.Infrastructure: The best and most clean infrastructure is available for our course and department. Wi-Fi, labs, gyms, classrooms, libraries, playing grounds, etc. are available. The quality of my hostel is very good—neat and clean. The quality of food in my hostel is very good—fresh and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides very good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 30% of students get placed in our college. The average salary offered is not good which is 3 LPM to 4 LPM. Around 15% of students get internships. It is an efficient college for middle-class families.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best. It provides the best lab facilities and classrooms. Wi-Fi is available in the college. Hostel has good rooms and serves healthy food. It provides joyful environment. Mess uses fresh vegetables and fruits for cooking. Medical facilities are available. It has good sports fields.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry ready. Students get accurate results. Semester exams are not easy. Around 75 students pass the exams. The pass percentage is 50%. .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and average placement rate.

content.Placements: 1. About 40-50% Percent of students were placed in my course. 2. The highest package 20-30 Lacs per annum, the lowest 3-5 Lacs per annum. 3. Essar group, kec international limited etc. Are the top recruiting companies. 4. About 60% students got internship and companies are National buildings construction corporation limited (NBCC), Ultratech cement limited etc. 5. Site engineer, Estimator etc.
content.Infrastructure: 1. We have access of library where all the books related to civil and other courses are available but students don't have access of Wi-Fi in college campus but in college hostel we have free Wi-Fi available. For practical works we have lab in which we have equipment related to civil engineering and overall I want to say that college infrastructure was very good. 2. Hostel infrastructure was very good which include free Wi-Fi, RO water, Canteen, Medical first Aid box was available in warden room. I will rate mess food 3.5 out of 5. We have free access of gym also in our campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am completely satisfied with my college, as they provide quality education.

content.Placements: 80% students got placed. The lowest package was 250000 and the highest package was 500000. The top recruiting companies were B. H. E. L, BEL, and HEAVELS. Almost 80-90% students got internship.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities were good. They provides Wi-Fi, labs, and smart classes. The quality of hostel food was too good. There was also a big ground available in the hostel.
content.Faculty: The teachers were highly qualified and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality was awesome. This course made the students industry ready. Exams were not that much difficult. It would become easy, when you study daily.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Ram Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: Everything is better in our college, and the environment and the infrastructure of the college are very good. college_info.college_name: Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary: Admission is open to all courses for the academic year 2024-25. Interested candidates can visit the official college website to know more and to apply for desired courses.

college_info.intro:
Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University comprises more than 20 departments including Management, Commerce, Economics, Computer Science & Application, Political Science, Zoology, Law, and others. The affiliated colleges and departments of the university offer a wide range of courses at the UG, and PG level, across various streams. MBA, MBA, and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
CRSU offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme at the UG level. The MBA programme aims to enhance personal strengths and management skills. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Relationship Managers, Account Managers, Project Managers, Financial Analysts, and others. The MA programme offered by the CRSU University is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including History, Fine Arts, Hindi, English, Mathematics, and others.
Below are some of the popular programmes offered by the Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University:
Check out more details in the below video:

faqs.answer: A:    According to unofficial online sources, the majority of Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University alumni are working in the Education sector with a 52% share. The other top sectors that involve the majority of alumni are Research and Business Development. The table below illustrates the detailed sector-wise distribution of alumni:SectorPercentage of AlumniEducation52%Research10%Business Development8%Human Resources6%Media and Communication5%Sales5%Others14%NOTE: The sectors involved in the 'Others
faqs.question: Where are CRSU alumni placed?

faqs.answer: A:    The university comprises a placement cell, responsible for carrying out all the placement-related activities around the institute. As per the official website, the MBA programme recorded a 100% placement rate, whereas MCA recorded a 60% placement rate in the past. Current salary of recent graduates is generally lower than the current salary of students who graduated in previous batches.Maximum salary refers to 80th Percentile; Median salary refers to 50th Percentile
faqs.question: Is Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University good for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    According to unofficial sources, the CRSU the highest package offered to the students passed out in recent years was between INR 7 LPA and INR 8 LPA. In addition to this, the average package offered during the recruitment process is around INR 4 LPA. Check the below table to know the CRSU placement package:ParticularsPlacement Statisticsthe highest packageINR 7 LPA to INR 8 LPAAverage packageINR 4 LPANOTE: The above salary data is gathered from Shiksha students' reviews.
faqs.question: What is the placement package at Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University?

faqs.answer: A:    The University has a Training and Placement Cell that provides possible support to students in their employability. The cell operates year-round to facilitate contact with companies, NGOs and Government funding agencies for entrepreneurship. The cell organises employment training such as grooming sessions, soft skills development, business etiquette, general personality development, effective presentation skills, interviewing skills, leadership and team building as required for industry pr

faqs.answer: A:    The course fee for MA at INR 24,600 to INR 36,500. Candidates who are shortlisted for the course can pay the fee to sure shot their admission. The admission process for the MA course at CRSU is entrance based. Candidates are required to meet the eligibility criteria of the course as well that is to have a graduation degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate.

reviews_list.review_title: Below average college due to lack of operation.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't have a great placement cell. They conduct job fairs only. No kind of recruiting companies are engaged in offering placements. Even the teachers don't focus on internships as well. No focus on the package is provided. Students concerned are the sole operators of their careers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college contains smart classrooms and good parking facility. But no hostel is provided, and the condition of canteen is below average. There is no proper Wi-Fi available. Medical facilities are not good. Sports and game tournaments are organised in a good manner. The library is nice here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent infrastructure. College is good for regular students.

review_content.Placements: Placements in my college are not of higher level as well as not of that lower level. Students with good grades like above 85% get placements usually. The highest salary package offered is 25 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Companies that usually come to hire students are HCL, Tata, HP, Studdus, Infosys, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has very big and well-maintained infrastructure. There are playgrounds for which you can get a PTI for it. The whole college has Wi-Fi. It has a good environment with exceptions at some places like mess or the canteen area. Canteens here are the biggest cons of this college. They do not have enough variety of food items to serve students. Some are quite famous to be played like cricket and football.

overview_faqs.question: Is MBA from Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University good?
overview_faqs.answer: MBA is one of the popular courses of CRSU. Whether it is curriculum, placement, course options or fee, CRSU stands as good choice for pursuing MBA for candidates. Candidates at CRSU can pursue MBA if they meet the eligibility criteria of the course. The university also performs good in the NIRF rankings. Fee:Pursuing MBA from CRSU is cheaper when compared to other universities. The fee is INR 60,100.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MA at CRSU?
overview_faqs.answer: The course fee for MA at INR 24,600 to INR 36,500. Candidates who are shortlisted for the course can pay the fee to sure shot their admission. The admission process for the MA course at CRSU is entrance based. Candidates are required to meet the eligibility criteria of the course as well that is to have a graduation degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate.

review_summary.college_name: CRSU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is good and I recommend others to take admission.

content.Placements: 70-80 percent of students got placed in my course, and the other students were doing master's degrees or preparing for other jobs. The highest package is approximately 7-8 LPA, the lowest 2 LPA & average package is about 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, HDFC Bank & KPMC. 75 percent of students got internships from my course in well-known companies like TCS, ICICI Bank, and Maruti Suzuki.
content.Infrastructure: The management department has a smart classroom with projectors, but there is no good Wi-Fi speed. The library is not well-maintained right now, but they are working on it. I'm not a hostel student, but I went with my friend. The hostel facilities are well-maintained & safe, and the mess serves fresh & hygienic food. There are very few games in it, but not as many as there should be. There are also medical facilities available in emergencies.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (Medical ) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's a decent experience in this college.

content.Placements: They provide placement opportunities on their campus. But they offer a low salary according to the college professor job. But for someone who just needs experience, it is a good opportunity, but someone who is applying for a permanent job should apply somewhere else at a good package.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Hostel rooms are pretty good, but washroom cleanliness is an issue. Classrooms and libraries provide a good environment for studying. Canteens provide decent food. Sports and events are organised so students can show their talent like archery, cricket, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Below average college due to lack of operation.

content.Placements: The college doesn't have a great placement cell. They conduct job fairs only. No kind of recruiting companies are engaged in offering placements. Even the teachers don't focus on internships as well. No focus on the package is provided. Students concerned are the sole operators of their careers.
content.Infrastructure: The college contains smart classrooms and good parking facility. But no hostel is provided, and the condition of canteen is below average. There is no proper Wi-Fi available. Medical facilities are not good. Sports and game tournaments are organised in a good manner. The library is nice here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure. College is good for regular students.

content.Placements: Placements in my college are not of higher level as well as not of that lower level. Students with good grades like above 85% get placements usually. The highest salary package offered is 25 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Companies that usually come to hire students are HCL, Tata, HP, Studdus, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: It has very big and well-maintained infrastructure. There are playgrounds for which you can get a PTI for it. The whole college has Wi-Fi. It has a good environment with exceptions at some places like mess or the canteen area. Canteens here are the biggest cons of this college. They do not have enough variety of food items to serve students. Some are quite famous to be played like cricket and football.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College is a very crucial phase of life. I recommend please be careful.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is very low. It's because there will be no practical or skill-based education provided. The teachers only teach basic book concepts. The teacher puts in no extra effort. Often, placement that comes to our campus comes from local businesses and vendors. There is no chance to get hired by MNCs
content.Infrastructure: There is no proper lab for b.com. department in the government college; no wifi for students; the only thing they provide is a library, which is okay but not so good, there are no hostel facilities available because it is a local college for local student who travel regularly for college there is canteen on campus with great food, and the sports department actually is very good; they do hard for that students who takes apart . There is a NCC group that regularly trains.

admission_overview.college_name: CRSU Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: CRSU Admission 2025is avalable for various UG and PG courses. The admission process for the courses on offer is either merit-based or entrance-based based depending on the course. The courses are offered in the regular or full-time mode for candidates who are shortlisted through the admission process. Candidates are required to apply for admission through the application form on the official website of the university. CRSU was established in 2014 with a mission to build innovative thinking.

CRSU offers admission to UG and PG courses based on merit or entrance exam scores depending upon the course. The university offers regular and full-time courses for candidates. Candidates can apply for any of the preferred courses online. Find below the key highlights forChaudhary Ranbir Singh University:
Particulars
CRSU Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

CRSU admission 2025to the UG and PG courses is based on merit and scores in the course-specific entrance exam. CRSU also conducts an entrance exam for admission in MBA, MSc and other courses. The eligibility criteria varies with the course level as well, check out the table below to learn more aboutCRSU courseseligibility and selection criteria:
Note:The information for BTech is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The courses at CRSU are offered for varying fee, and the fee structure is a component of various refundable and non-refundable components. Based on the admission process, candidates are shortlisted, and the candidates who receive the final admission offer are eligible to pay theCRSU fee. Check out the table below to learn more about the seat intake and fee for the courses at CRSU:

CRSU admission processincludes multiple steps. Candidates are first required to apply for the course they desire through the application form. The application form is available online on the official website of the university. Admission to CRSU courses is both merit and entrance-based. Below is the step-wise admission process explained for CRSU:
Step 1: CRSU Application Process 2025

Candidates must fulfill the eligibility requirements. Those who do, can apply online for CRSU admission. As per the information collated from the web, candidates need to pay an application fee ofINR 500to register for a course. Candidates need to fill out the form and upload the specified documents to complete the application process.
Step 2: Selection Process

CRSU shortlists candidates for most of the courses based on the entrance exam or through merit. The university considers academic merit for admission to courses like B.Ed, Certification, etc. The first level of selection after the application process will be either based on the entrance exam or academic merit.
Step 3: Final Shortlist and Fee Payment

Candidates who receive the final shortlist must pay the course fee that is specified by the university through the means mentioned. Candidates who make the payment of the fee for their course are eligible to attend the regular classes at the university.

faqs.answer: MBA is one of the popular courses of CRSU. Whether it is curriculum, placement, course options or fee, CRSU stands as good choice for pursuing MBA for candidates. Candidates at CRSU can pursue MBA if they meet the eligibility criteria of the course. The university also performs good in the NIRF rankings.Fee:Pursuing MBA from CRSU is cheaper when compared to other universities. The fee is INR 60,100.

faqs.question: Is MBA available in CRSU?
faqs.answer: Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University offers two-year Management courses through an entrance based admission process. The university offers MBA as a two-year programme at the PG course level. Candidates are required to fill out the application form and then appear for the university conducted entrance exam to participate in the admission process. The seat intake for MBA at CRSU is 50 and candidates are given admission offers based on their performance.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in CRSU?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot get direct admission to CRSU. Admission to a lot of courses is done through entrance exams or on the basis of merit. The university conducts an entrance exam to shortlist candidates for MA, MBA, etc. However, for a few courses, admission is merit-based. Candidates must fill out the forms for entrance and for the course seperately depending upon the requirement of the course.

faqs.question: Does CRSU accepts CUET?
faqs.answer: No, CRSU is not a participating university of CUET. CRSU shortlists candidates through the entrance exam conducted by the university or through merit. To appear for the exam, candidates need to register for the entrance. The university considers academic merit for admission to courses like BA, Certification, etc. The first level of selection after the application process will be either based on entrance exam or academic merit.

faqs.question: Who all are eligible for B Sc. at Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University?
faqs.answer: The eligibility for B Sc. at Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University depends on B sc programme and guidelines which is provided on University's website. Students who have completed their 12 (HSC) studies from Science background with (physics, chemistry, mathematics/biology) from a recognised board will be allowed to apply for this  programme at Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University. For the accurate information about the programme it's better to visit official website .

notes: Note:The information for BTech is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

placement_data.title: CRSU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University comprises a placement cell, responsible for carrying out all the placement-related activities throughout the year. The official CRSU placement report is not out yet. As per the data sourced from Shiksha students' reviews, the placement rate recorded in recent years was between 75% to 80% . Further, the highest package offered over the past few years was between INR 7 LPA and INR 8 LPA . The average package offered during Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University placements was INR 4 LPA . ICICI Bank, Pepsico, TATA Motors, and many other leading companies visited the campus in recent years.

faqs.question: How are B Sc. placements at Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University?
faqs.answer: CRSU invites companies through mail and if the companies are interested they revert. Then the students register themselves for the placement and then both the company and CRSU placement cell conduct counselling for the students then a pre-placement talk is there with the students of the university the interview happens and the qualified students are selected. The highest package offered was Rs 8 LPA last year and the top companies visiting the campus were Tata Motors, ICICI Bank, Pepsico etc. The average package offered by these companies was INR 4 lpa.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is good and I recommend others to take admission.
reviews.review_text: The management department has a smart classroom with projectors, but there is no good Wi-Fi speed. The library is not well-maintained right now, but they are working on it. I'm not a hostel student, but I went with my friend. The hostel facilities are well-maintained & safe, and the mess serves fresh & hygienic food. There are very few games in it, but not as many as there should be. There are also medical facilities available in emergencies.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by MKM Group of Colleges For GirlsReviewed on 15 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's a decent experience in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Hostel rooms are pretty good, but washroom cleanliness is an issue. Classrooms and libraries provide a good environment for studying. Canteens provide decent food. Sports and events are organised so students can show their talent like archery, cricket, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Priyadarshini Indira Gandhi Government College For WomenReviewed on 8 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Below average college due to lack of operation.
reviews.review_text: The college contains smart classrooms and good parking facility. But no hostel is provided, and the condition of canteen is below average. There is no proper Wi-Fi available. Medical facilities are not good. Sports and game tournaments are organised in a good manner. The library is nice here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Advanced Institute of EducationReviewed on 25 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure. College is good for regular students.
reviews.review_text: It has very big and well-maintained infrastructure. There are playgrounds for which you can get a PTI for it. The whole college has Wi-Fi. It has a good environment with exceptions at some places like mess or the canteen area. Canteens here are the biggest cons of this college. They do not have enough variety of food items to serve students. Some are quite famous to be played like cricket and football.

reviews.review_heading: College is a very crucial phase of life. I recommend please be careful.
reviews.review_text: There is no proper lab for b.com. department in the government college; no wifi for students; the only thing they provide is a library, which is okay but not so good, there are no hostel facilities available because it is a local college for local student who travel regularly for college there is canteen on campus with great food, and the sports department actually is very good; they do hard for that students who takes apart . There is a NCC group that regularly trains.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this university is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is called well-maintained classrooms, with a full Wi-Fi campus, but the library of the university is average; there is not a proper arrangement of seating. Medical facilities and sports are not that good here because I haven't seen students playing any kind of sports.

reviews.review_heading: University is very good but campus is average and we can say it's value for money.
reviews.review_text: Faculty and the infrastructure of the university are average, like Wi-Fi normally stays average. Classrooms are well maintained in a library sitting arrangement. And about hostels, I don't know because I am a local student. For sports and games, here NCC clubs are there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by MKM Group of Colleges For GirlsReviewed on 30 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Very supportive college staff and college management.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent facilities with all the requirements. Well-maintained laboratories, classrooms, and medical facilities are provided 24 hours a day in colleges and hostels. There is a large, fully computerized library and a normal library. And there is a free Wi-Fi zone.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by MKM Group of Colleges For GirlsReviewed on 26 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent academics, and the best college in India.
reviews.review_text: The building of our college is very nicely constructed and fulfills all the necessities of students and teachers. Lecture rooms are well-built, and computer labs and medical laboratories are well-equipped. Auditoriums are properly up-to-date. The college campus's infrastructure is excellent.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by MKM Group of Colleges For GirlsReviewed on 26 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The best academic and placement institute in the NCR.
reviews.review_text: The college boasts modern infrastructure equipped with state-of-the-art facilities, including spacious classrooms, labs, a vast library with digital resources, and recreational areas for students. With this well-planned infrastructure, the college provides students with an inspiring space to excel in their academics and cultivate a vibrant campus community.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by MKM Group of Colleges For GirlsReviewed on 18 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of MKM Group of Colleges For Girls.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good and comfortable. No one can encounter any problem; big classes are available with proper Wi-Fi connectivity, good library, and labs are also there. Proper medical facility, canteen, and hostel are available there. Taste of food in mess is acceptable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by MKM Group of Colleges For GirlsReviewed on 13 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, my experience in college is very good. I enjoy each and every moment of my college time.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is good, the garden area in the college is very good, the digital classrooms are good, the library is very peaceful and consists of many books, the digital boards are technologically advanced, the college also has Wi-Fi facility, and hostel service is present.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Advanced Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 20 Jan 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, bad placement, bad infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities of this college are average; no special facilities are provided by the college. Hostels are available at this college, AC or non-AC.
The quality of food is not good and other facilities are below average. The mess is very bad. The canteen is not available at this college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by MKM Group of Colleges For GirlsReviewed on 20 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Best girls college in Haryana.
reviews.review_text: The college is very spacious; it has all the necessary infrastructure, like a computer lab, a chemistry lab, a biotechnology lab, a multi sports field, a fully computerized library, and a lush green campus. The college campus infrastructure is excellent overall.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by MKM Group of Colleges For GirlsReviewed on 20 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Teaching quality is very good .
reviews.review_text: MKM College's infrastructure is very good. All these facilities are available like a canteen, laboratories, wi-fi campus, smart classes, many computer labs, department-wise medical labs, etc. They are well maintained, the living space is good and hygienic food is provided.

review_content.General: Approximately 90% of the students get placements from this college. This college is very well developed. The highest salary package offered in this college is 8 LPA, while the average salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA to 2.5 LPA. Mostly, IT companies visit this college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very well developed and maintained. The hostel facility is also good, and the food served in the hostel is very hygienic and tasty. Many types of facilities are available in this college like sports facilities for students who play at national and state-level, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: A bad nightmare with bad experience.

review_content.Placements: No placements were offered in the mechanical branch in my college. Some students of the computer science and electrical engineering are only placed. Overall, bad placement. The students are frustrated after the completion of the study having no job. Only a few students i.e., 1:250 ratio of the students are placed in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The classrooms are spacious, with the projector. The sports only happen during the sports week. The labs are not good. Some apparatus are in working conditions, and some are dead. No medical facilities are available. The library is equipped with a lot of good books.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2012
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: The college has reasonably good faculty as compared to other colleges considering similar ranks in WBJEE. Different events are organized in collaboration with IITs. A tech fest “Prabuddha” and a cultural fest “Yagvik” is organized every year. Placement is centralized with other Techno group colleges and companies such as TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Honeywell, KPIT Cummins, Syntel, Verizon, Accenture, Zycus, Tata Chemical, Johnson Controls etc. being regular recruiters. review_summary.college_name: BM College of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of BM College of Technology.

content.Placements: Maximum students have 60%, and this is too low in a degree. Students must work hard to get placed. Reputed companies like Pen India, KTRC Construction, and many other companies offer placements. The top role offered is a supervisor.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities like a library, canteen, sports ground, club house, etc., are available. The structure is good, and many college players come to our college to play games and other sports during summer and also other days. They enjoy the facilities of our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: BM College of Technology is a good college and provide a better future.

content.Placements: Approximately 90% of the students get placements from this college. This college is very well developed. The highest salary package offered in this college is 8 LPA, while the average salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA to 2.5 LPA. Mostly, IT companies visit this college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very well developed and maintained. The hostel facility is also good, and the food served in the hostel is very hygienic and tasty. Many types of facilities are available in this college like sports facilities for students who play at national and state-level, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: A bad nightmare with bad experience.

content.Placements: No placements were offered in the mechanical branch in my college. Some students of the computer science and electrical engineering are only placed. Overall, bad placement. The students are frustrated after the completion of the study having no job. Only a few students i.e., 1:250 ratio of the students are placed in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The classrooms are spacious, with the projector. The sports only happen during the sports week. The labs are not good. Some apparatus are in working conditions, and some are dead. No medical facilities are available. The library is equipped with a lot of good books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2012

content.Other: The college has reasonably good faculty as compared to other colleges considering similar ranks in WBJEE. Different events are organized in collaboration with IITs. A tech fest “Prabuddha” and a cultural fest “Yagvik” is organized every year. Placement is centralized with other Techno group colleges and companies such as TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Honeywell, KPIT Cummins, Syntel, Verizon, Accenture, Zycus, Tata Chemical, Johnson Controls etc. being regular recruiters. Though the boy’s hostel is situated near to the college while the girl’s hostel is somewhat far and hostel facilities are not satisfactory. Canteen food is economical but lacks in variety. There is no attention towards personal mentoring.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2013

content.Other: Best in infrastructure and faculty. Low fees makes easier to study in the college. But the facility inside the premises are not that much good. You may not find everything in the market but you may find the needful things all the time. The best part is the library which is full of books you may need.

reviews_list.review_title: So disappointed by the faculty members and placement ratio. No fests or events are organized here.

review_content.Placements: Placement percentage is very low. Just a few numbers of companies have been approaching in the past years. And the companies approaching are also not offering a good package. This year, a very low percentage (about 10-20%) of students were placed. The highest package was about 6 LPA, and the lowest was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amul and Nestlé.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for self-study.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Labs are good. Classes are not updated and have some issues like fans and lights are not working and many things. The quality of the faculty is also bad in my opinion but if you are in college, you will not have classes anyway. I advise you that study is the key.

reviews.review_heading: College is going to make a historic impact on placements.
reviews.review_text: College provides all kinds of facilities where computer labs, Wi-Fi, library and all other facilities. There are indoor sports are available. Personal volleyball and basketball grounds are available. All kinds of essential facilities are available for students which seems to be good.

reviews.review_heading: So disappointed by the faculty members and placement ratio. No fests or events are organized here.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is fine and average. The computer lab is not well maintained, but other labs like Chemistry and Microbiology are very well maintained. The college library is just awesome with many modern facilities, but hostel infrastructure and facilities are so poor.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Dairy and Food Technology, Udaipur.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi available for the students to use for studying. Labs and classrooms are amazing, and smart classrooms are amazing. The library is large and contains about 15,000 books and 2500 e-books. The facility in the hostel is below the expectations and the food provided is not tasty.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for dairy and food technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is well-designed. There are properly maintained labs and smart classrooms but there is no proper facility for games. Mess and canteen food is not good. Hostel area is small. Our college organises regular sports events.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice college as placement percentage is very high and good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: As a government body there is good facilities in every department Wi-Fi facilities, smart labs, varied infrastructure, has labs for every department classrooms, library facilities is good and best sports facilities given from university. Hostel facilities is up to the mark. Wi-Fi facilities and good food facilities are given.

reviews.review_heading: I want to rate the college 4 out of 5. Placements and facilities on our campus are good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, big classrooms, AC seminar hall and a big library are available in our college. All the materials are available in the food lab. A testing lab is present. In the hostel, Wi-Fi and TV facilities are available. Spacious hostel rooms and a common room are available. Food, medical and sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure, faculty members and facilities are very good.
reviews.review_text: We have a library with good availability and a range of books. Labs are equipped with all necessary equipment and various machinery such as form fill seal machine, capping machine, cup filling machine, evaporator and many others. There is also a tomato ketchup plant.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with great course, and I had a great experience.
reviews.review_text: The college has a basic building and not many facilities. It's an average building, and the same goes with the hostel too. Though it has all the basic necessities, you'll lack comfort, which I think what the hostel is all about.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is excellent in placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have many facilities, but it has ample for our requirements. Our campus has a Wi-Fi zone, a huge library, about 30 to 40 classrooms, and about 5-6 laboratories for different subjects which are well-equipped. Our college is very good at sports and games, and approximately all outdoor sports are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied. It's worth it in terms of ROI. Infrastructure and hostel facilities need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our college has less infrastructure, poor Wi-Fi, average labs and average classrooms. However, the library is good, and there are average canteen facilities. However, sports grounds are very well maintained, and there is enough space on every ground. The new college building is also under construction and will be completed within a year.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is great and good in sports, studies with great infrastructure good placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. The library is small, but we get all the important books in the library. For some books, we get into trouble. The hostel is good and well-furnished. Rooms are a bit small, so we need extra space. The canteen food is great. There are proper health checkups at the month-end.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Dairy and Food Science Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, library, individual labs, Wi-Fi room, and a student-welfare room. The quality of food provided in both boys' and girls' hostels is very good. The hostels are neat and clean. Students who play sports can have very good opportunities as the college supports them. Every year, national-level programs are organised, and the college teams participate in it.

reviews.review_heading: Completely satisfying course curriculum, good placements, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar. The college infrastructure is quite satisfying. Classrooms, including smart classes are there. Labs are fully equipped with various machines and equipments to enhance our practical knowledge. The library of our college is also full of books, magazines etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement college, satisfied.
reviews.review_text:
Microbiology lab and biotechnology lab are nice. Infrastructure is good, but not well
Wi-fi is available, library has a good amount of books, journals. Technology department has nice equipment for only learning. It has a tomato ketchup plant and aonla candy plant.

Top roles offered here are junior executives and technical officers (production department, quality department, research and development), etc.
